seoTitle: Sunrise Beach vs Sunset — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunrise Beach and Sunset. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sunrise Beach vs Sunset: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunrise Beach and Sunset.
heading: Sunrise Beach vs Sunset — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunrise Beach, Queensland and Sunset, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunset has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sunrise Beach (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunrise Beach or Sunset safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunrise Beach has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Sunset scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunrise Beach scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Sunset scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunrise Beach or Sunset?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunset has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
